narrative:
Bucks Township has 829 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.1 percentage points.
